description: You are a Solar Engineer designing a Concentrated Solar Power (CSP) system for industrial process heat. Energy3D is currently open with a blank project. Do the following: 1) Set the project location to 'Phoenix, AZ'. 2) Set the simulation date to June 21 (Summer Solstice). 3) Add at least 4 Parabolic Troughs to the site. 4) Adjust each trough so its length is approximately 50 meters (acceptable range: 40m to 60m). 5) Ensure the troughs are oriented North-South (Azimuth ~0° or 180°) so they track the sun effectively. 6) Run the 'Daily Environmental Temperature and Solar Energy' analysis to calculate the thermal energy collection. 7) Save the project file to ~/Documents/Energy3D/trough_plant.ng3. 8) Create a text file at ~/Documents/Energy3D/thermal_yield.txt and write the estimated total daily thermal energy yield you observed in the analysis.
